---
title: "Hello, Jank"
author:
  - name: Daniel Slutsky
    url: https://scicloj.github.io/contributors/daslu/
    image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5673102?v=4
    links:
      - {icon: github, href: 'https://github.com/daslu'}
type: post
date: '2026-04-29'
category: libs
tags: [jank, janqua, quarto]
draft: true
filters:
  - jank
---

This page is rendered with [Janqua](https://github.com/scicloj/janqua), a Quarto extension that evaluates [Jank](https://jank-lang.org) code blocks during rendering. It is the first Jank-authored post on Clojure Civitas.

A `{.clojure .jank}` block is sent to a Jank nREPL during the render and the result replaces the block. The same Kindly conventions used by Clay apply.

## Arithmetic

```{.clojure .jank}
(+ 1 2 3)
```

## Hiccup

```{.clojure .jank}
^:kind/hiccup
[:div {:style "color: coral; font-size: 24px;"}
  "Hello from Jank!"]
```
